celestisynth_stock.title: Stockpile all 3 Celestisynth inputs — Lunar Stone, Zephyr Deposit, Solar Crystal (from Nether)

music_plan.title: Collect 3 Etched music discs or Xerca instruments — the foundation for your Ch16 music hall

subtitle.text: Ch16 is Celestisynth mastery and the music hall. Come with all three ores. Come with a music plan.

description: CH.15 · READY FOR CH16
▸ Ch16 (The Long Road Home) has two major pillars:
Celestisynth mastery — full armor + tool set from the chain,
and the music hall — Etched + Xerca music system build.
Both require prep that happens in Ch15.
Do not enter Ch16 without the ores stockpiled
and the music system seeded.
◈ CELESTISYNTH PREP CHECKLIST
└ ✦ Lunar Stone / Lunar Scrap: 32+ (deep underground craters)
└ ✦ Zephyr Deposit material: 16+ (Y≥130 mountain peaks)
└ ✦ Solar Crystal: 16+ (Nether dimension — fire resist potion req.)
└ ✦ Celestisynth forge setup: check JEI for celestisynth: crafting
(likely requires specific forge multiblock or crafting station)
└ Target: enough for a full armor set + tools
Celestial Netherite has the highest durability + enchantability
in the pack — this is the Ch16 material payoff
◈ ETCHED + XERCA MUSIC SYSTEM
└ Etched: custom music disc creation mod
Records audio, encodes onto custom discs
Music Note Block → Disc → Jukebox playback
└ Xerca: instruments mod — playable instruments in-world
Guitar, Lute, Flute, and others
└ Music Hall build (Ch16): dedicated building with
Jukeboxes, instruments, seating, recording setup
└ Start collecting: Etched discs from dungeon loot,
Xerca instruments from craft or villager trades
◈ PATH TO DIVINITY AWARENESS
└ Ch16 also covers the Path to Divinity (PTD) dark path
Philosopher's Stone requires 999 villager soul consumption
via Mass Accumulate mechanic (scroll: path_divinity)
└ If pursuing PTD: DO NOT spend villager reputation in Ch15
building trades — you need a large villager population
for the Ch16-17 Mass Accumulate sequence
└ If not pursuing: ignore PTD entirely — it is optional
└ PTD gives: unlimited item transmutation (FMA reference)
Only relevant if you want the divine craft finale
▸ The Long Road Home is the chapter about
building the things that last.
The sword rusts. The armor breaks.
The music hall stands.
The wine cellar ages.
The road connects cities that outlive the builder.
Ch16 is the chapter where permanence becomes the goal.
Come with the materials to make something permanent.
▶ Stockpile all 3 Celestisynth ore types [check]
▶ Collect 3 Etched discs or Xerca instruments [check]
◇ Ch16 tab: The Long Road Home.
Celestisynth armor + Eiswein cellar + music hall + Small Ships.
These are the four Ch16 build projects.
All four are large. All four require Ch15 prep.
The chapter rewards are proportional to the preparation.
